subcodes.first_line: O Asad! Thy letter hath attained unto the Divine Presence, and the gaze of thy Lord, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful, hath turned toward it. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسد قد حضر کتابک لدی الوجه و توجه الیه لحاظ ربک العزیز المنان طوبی لک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name, @praise and encouragement
